caption: A man wearing a pink t-shirt and grey shorts is practicing basketball in an indoor gymnasium. The gym features a polished wooden court with blue painted areas and blue tiered bleachers along the walls. In the initial sequence, the man stands on the court, holding a basketball and preparing to jump. He then leaps high into the air, reaching toward the basketball hoop to attempt a dunk. After the jump, the ball is seen flying through the air, away from the basket. Finally, the man lands back on the court, standing upright with his arms raised in a celebratory or expressive gesture. No on-screen text or logos are visible in the scene.
